name: Entry Points, CLI & Examples
description: Command-line entry points (tau decide/calibrate, generate-corpus) and the runnable quickstart example — the outermost Presentation layer.

name: Application
description: internal/app — lifecycle, top-level dispatch wiring, concrete LLM injection; NewDispatcher loads DefaultProfile() to activate the péremption guard.

name: Orchestration
description: internal/orchestration — the 8-step Decide dispatcher, Decision and Trace types, threshold aliases.

name: Calibration & Drift
description: internal/calibration — Profile, byte-identical serialization, AtomicThresholds, drift detection, DefaultProfile, store.

name: Domain Core — opérateur τ
description: internal/tau core (operator.go, frontier.go, diagnostics.go): the single public Kernel.Decide API, Exchange/Decision/Trace types, FrontierCheck guard; plus the internal/ architecture & anti-pattern étanchéité guards.

name: Dimensions (D-SENS / D-AUTORITÉ / D-INVARIANT)
description: internal/tau/dimensions — the three orthogonal scoring dimensions and the shared Score type.

name: Invariants I1-I5
description: internal/tau/invariants — the five refutable invariant evaluators (chap. III.8.5) and their native Go fuzz targets and seed corpora.

name: Bridges (LLM, AgentMeshKafka)
description: internal/bridge — the LLM Client interface + deterministic Stub (isolates non-determinism) and the AgentMeshKafka FileAdapter + neutral DTO empirical bridge.

name: Shared Kernel (thresholds, errors, testutil)
description: internal/thresholds (transverse value type, ADR-0006), internal/errors (typed errors + sentinels, ADR-0009), internal/testutil (BuildExchange helpers).

name: End-to-End Tests & Golden Fixtures
description: test/e2e end-to-end scenarios and the byte-identical golden calibration corpus under tests/calibration.

name: Documentation
description: PRD, CLAUDE, README, CHANGELOG and docs/ (theory, algorithms, ADRs, empirical reports, archived plans & audits).
